title: BSOD Investigation
description: Collect crash, dump, driver, hardware, and event evidence to identify likely bugcheck causes and safe next diagnostics.
starter_prompt: Investigate recent blue screens. Collect evidence and recommend next diagnostics.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output '== BugCheck/WHEA/Kernel events =='; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Id=41,1001,6008,18,19,47; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30)} -MaxEvents 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List; Write-Output '== Disk/driver/update related errors =='; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Level=1,2,3; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30)} -MaxEvents 160 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'disk|ntfs|stor|whea|display|nvlddmkm|amdkmdag|driver|windowsupdate' } | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List; Write-Output '== Minidumps =='; Get-ChildItem $env:SystemRoot\Minidump -Filter *.dmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

phases.prompt: Collect recent BugCheck, Kernel-Power, WHEA, disk, driver, update events, and minidump paths.
Analyze collected BugCheck, Kernel-Power, WHEA, disk, driver, update, and minidump evidence. Identify likely cause categories and missing evidence.
Correlate crash times with updates, drivers, storage, memory, and thermal evidence.
Research official guidance for identified stop code, driver, hardware, or vendor advisory.
phases.completion: Official guidance is cited or unavailable.

phases.prompt: Review whether recommended next tests are safe, relevant, and ordered by risk.

Create a technician-readable BSOD report with crash timeline, evidence, likely causes, actions/tools used, verification status, artifacts/logs, cleanup status, confidence, residual risk, and next diagnostic steps.
phases.completion: User has a safe next-step plan.

phases.prompt: Preserve crash evidence and reports; remove only temporary scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: Bugcheck evidence and timeline were collected.
Driver advice uses official sources when possible.
No blind driver removal or reset is recommended.
